name: handle-pr
description: Autonomously handle GitHub PR review comments: evaluate each thread, implement HIGH/MEDIUM changes, run tests, Copilot quality pass, commit, reply to every thread, then watch for follow-up comments for 12 minutes.

interface.shortDescription: Autonomously handle GitHub PR review comments: evaluate each thread, implement HIGH/MEDIUM changes, run tests, Copilot quality pass, commit, reply to every thread, then watch for follow-up comments for 12 minutes.
interface.longDescription: Autonomously handle GitHub PR review comments: evaluate each thread, implement HIGH/MEDIUM changes, run tests, Copilot quality pass, commit, reply to every thread, then watch for follow-up comments for 12 minutes. Works best on a local machine with user-specific files and tools available.
defaultPrompt: Handle the PR review comments end-to-end: evaluate each thread, implement the worthwhile changes, run checks, and prepare replies.
